case_title: GABRIEL MARTINEZ VS. BRITISH MOTOR DISTRIBUTORS, LTD.

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF MARTINEZ, GABRIEL AS TO DEFENDANT BRITISH MOTOR DISTRIBUTORS, LTD.

DECLARATION RE: UNABLE TO SERVE DEFENDANT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MARTINEZ, GABRIEL
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY MARTINEZ, GABRIEL AS TO DEFENDANT BRITISH MOTOR DISTRIBUTORS, LTD. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-01-2016 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-01-2016 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAR-07-2016 AT 5:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PROOF OF SERVICE IN FILE IS DEFECTIVE. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
TRIAL RESET TO APR-05-2016 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF MAR-07-2016 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $40.00 SERVED FEB-22-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BRITISH MOTOR DISTRIBUTORS, LTD.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT BRITISH MOTOR DISTRIBUTORS, LTD.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. DEFENDANT APPEARED. THE PLAINTIFF SHOWED UP AT 10:30 AM AFTER THE CASE HAD BEEN DISMISSED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
